@Sean_Hoee @thomasstoffels Does DuitNow process and accept USDC or Sol? I don't think so because BNM does not recognize USDC and Sol as legal tender. DuitNow only processes and settles Ringgit. I'm sure it's just Jupiter wallet doing accounting magic while the Malaysian trustee bank does the actual payment in Ringgit. But I don't care about the backend stuff as long as they make us think we pay using USDC and Solana.

Iran just made Bitcoin mandatory for oil tanker tolls through the Strait of Hormuz. Not stablecoins. Not SWIFT. Bitcoin. Here's why that matters and why stablecoins were never an option.

USDT and USDC both have built-in blacklist functions. The issuer can freeze any address with a single click. Iran is the most sanctioned nation on Earth. The moment a stablecoin payment to Iran is identified, those funds get locked. That's not a payment system, that's a trap that springs on command.

The new GENIUS Act makes it worse. Dollar-pegged stablecoins now carry explicit compliance controls that make them unusable for sanctioned entities. Stablecoins are becoming more controllable, not less.

Bitcoin has no issuer. No compliance officer. No freeze button. No central point of failure. The only settlement layer that works without permission is the one nobody controls.

This isn't ideology. When your choices are "money that can be frozen" or "money that can't," the decision makes itself.

$2 million per tanker. Hormuz handles 20% of global oil. The math does itself.

@bowtiedwhitebat @chooserich WLFI (Trump-backed crypto project) deposited ~5B of its own illiquid WLFI tokens as collateral on Dolomite (DeFi lending protocol co-founded by a WLFI advisor). Borrowed ~$75M in stablecoins (mostly their USD1 + USDC), sent $40M+ to Coinbase Prime. This drained the USD1 pool to 93-100% utilization, locking regular depositors out of withdrawals temporarily.

Team's response: Normal treasury yield strategy, nowhere near liquidation, criticism is FUD. They've repaid ~$25M so far. WLFI token hit ATL amid the drama.

宝子们目前Hyperliquid上开启了两场 @RiverdotInc 相关活动，活动截止时间为4月19日！

一是RIVER/USDC现货交易竞赛，参与该交易对交易，交易量前20名可获得RIVER奖励，交易量达标还能领取River积分。

二是内容创作竞赛，分享RIVER的行情分析、交易思路或真实观点，即可参与积分瓜分。
 
这两场活动分别适合交易者和内容创作者，当前 $RIVER 价格处于回落阶段大家可以借助活动，在当前价位积累 $RIVER 。

如果感兴趣，建议先做好自主研究，尤其是创作者活动可以多了解详情！
 
#River #Hyperliquid  #DeFi
